hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$CMD" in *'uv add'*|*'pip install'*) echo 'BLOCKED: 依存関係の追加には明示的な承認が必要です' >&2; exit 1;; esac
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in */.github/*) echo 'BLOCKED: CI/CDファイルの変更は明示的な許可が必要です' >&2; exit 1;; esac
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$FILE" && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE"; fi
